name: No Ascension
description_zh: 在没有任何进阶调整的影响下游玩。

name: Weary Traveler
description: Ancients only heal [blue]80%[/blue] of your missing HP.
description_zh: 先古之民只会回复你已损失生命值的[blue]80%[/blue]。

name: Poverty
description: Enemies and Treasure Chests drop [blue]25%[/blue] less [gold]Gold[/gold].
description_zh: 敌人和宝箱掉落的[gold]金币[/gold]减少[blue]25%[/blue]。

name: Tight Belt
description: Start each run with 1 less potion slot.
description_zh: 游戏开始时药水栏位减少1。

name: Scarcity
description: Rare and Upgraded cards appear less often.
description_zh: 稀有和已升级卡牌更少出现。

name: Tough Enemies
description: All enemies are harder to kill.
description_zh: 所有的敌人变得更难杀死。

name: Deadly Enemies
description_zh: 所有的敌人变得更加致命。

name: Double Boss
description: Fight two bosses at the end of Act 3.
description_zh: 在第3幕末尾与两名首领战斗。
